description: Minimum VS Code extension registry for the six Secure CaseTracker memory-safe language paths plus container tooling.

policy.dependencyPolicy: Only list the official primary extension or official extension pack for each MSL path and the official primary container tooling extension; extension-managed dependencies are not listed separately.
policy.deprecatedPolicy: Deprecated extensions are reported when installed, but not removed automatically.

extensions.purpose: Official C# Dev Kit for VS Code
Official Go extension for VS Code
Official Java extension pack for VS Code
Official Python extension for VS Code
Official Rust analyzer extension for VS Code
Official Swift extension for VS Code
Official Microsoft Container Tools extension for Docker/Podman container workflows in VS Code

deprecatedExtensions.purpose: Deprecated Swift extension; report only when installed
